social.text:

Bayrağımızı dünyanın dört bir yanında gururla dalgalandıran millî sporcularımız ve 81 ilimizin yanı sıra farklı ülkelerde bilgileriyle, becerileriyle, örnek kişilikleriyle

social.name: Israeli PM Office
social.text:
R to @IsraeliPM: My wife Sara and I, together with all citizens of Israel, send our deepest condolences to his family and embrace them in this difficult hour.

May his memory be a blessing.

social.name: Israeli PM Office
social.text: R to @IsraeliPM: Itamar, of blessed memory, a resident of the community of Eli, was a courageous commander who fought heroically against Hezbollah terrorists to defend our northern border.

social.name: Israeli PM Office
social.text:
Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu:

“It is with deep sorrow that we were informed this evening that Major (Res.) Itamar Sapir, of blessed memory, had fallen in battle in southern Lebanon.

social.text:
Today I paid tribute to the infected blood community for their extraordinary courage in their long fight for truth and justice.

Thank you to the Infected Blood Memorial Committee for the care, compassion and dedication behind this service at St Paul’s Cathedral.

social.name: Emmanuel Macron
social.text:
Sverige har valt Naval Groups FDI-fregatt för att modernisera sin marin.
                       
Jag tackar Sverige och uppskattar det förtroende som visats Frankrike.

Efter Frankrikes beslut att utrusta sig med Saabs GlobalEye för att förnya sin flotta av radarspaningsflygplan

social.name: Emmanuel Macron
social.text:
La Suède a fait le choix de la frégate de défense et d'intervention de Naval Group pour moderniser sa marine.

Je remercie la Suède et je mesure la confiance faite à la France.

Après le choix fait par la France de se doter du Global Eye de Saab pour renouveler sa flotte d'avions

social.name: Keir Starmer
social.text:
I condemn the deadly attack on a mosque in San Diego. My thoughts are with those affected.

social.name: Nayib Bukele
social.text:
